ATKINSON COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT REPORTS TREES BROKEN OFF AT THE TOPS AND DAMAGE CONSISTENT WITH EF-0 INTENSITY IN BETWEEN COUNTY ROAD 38 AND LAZY NINE ROAD TO THE SOUTH OF U.S. HIGHWAY 82. TIME ESTIMATED USING RADAR DATA.
RADAR OBSERVATIONS INDICATED A TDS SOUTH OF HIGHWAY 82 IN MOSTLY RURAL TERRAIN. NO DAMAGE REPORTS HAVE BEEN REPORTED AT THIS TIME. TIME ESTIMATED USING RADAR DATA.

HOME SECURITY CAMERAS CAPTURED A TORNADO MOVING THROUGH THE YARD OF THE PROPERTY AND CAUSED MINOR DAMAGE TO THE HOUSE. BASED ON THIS INFORMATION, THE TORNADO WAS GIVEN AN ESTIMATED EF-0 RATING WITH NO ADDITIONAL SURVEYING EXPECTED.

STORM SURVEY CONCLUDED A TORNADO OCCURRED WITHIN THE ROYAL DRIVE SUBDIVISION ALONG THE JEKYLL ISLAND CAUSEWAY AND THE LITTLE SATILLA RIVER IN GLYNN COUNTY. DAMAGE WAS ESTIMATED AS EF-1 WITH 90 MPH PEAK WINDS. NUMEROUS TREES WERE DAMAGED ALONG WITH SEVERAL DOCK SHELTERS ON THE RIVER.
PUBLIC REPORT OF TREES DOWN AT THE ROYAL OAKS SUBDIVISION SOUTHWEST OF BRUNSWICK.
RADAR OBSERVATION INDICATE A TDS SIGNATURE WITH DEBRIS EXTENDING UP TO 10KFT. DEBRIS SIGNATURE HAS SINCED MOVED OFF THE COAST.

*** 4 INJ *** PUBLIC AFFAIRS OFFICER OF KINGS BAY NAVAL BASE CONFIRMED FOUR INJUIRIES OCCURRED AS A RESULT OF A TORNADO ON SUNDAY. NWS SURVEY TEAM WILL INVESTIGATE THIS AFTERNOON. LSR UPDATED TO INCLUDE CONFIRMED INJURIES.

NWS SURVEY REVEALED EF2 DAMAGE, ALSO CONFIRMED BY MEASURED 120 MPH WIND FROM COAST GUARD VESSEL. DAMAGE PATH ABOUT 3 MILES LONG, UP TO 1/2 MILE WIDE. NAVY PIO SHOULD BE CONTACTED REGARDING ANY IMPACT TO BASE.
PUBLIC REPORT OF QUARTER SIZE IN KINGSLAND.

PIERCE COUNTY LAW ENFORCEMENT REPORTED DAM FAILURE OCCURRING ALONG THE LAKEVIEW COUNTRY CLUB LAKE. PROPERTY THREATENED FROM FLOOD WATER INCLUDING RESISDENTS ALONG EDGEWOOD CIRCLE, LAKEVIEW DRIVE, FOX TRAIL, AND AZALEA STREET ALONG BAXTER/BERNIE BRANCH DRAINAGE. DEPT OF TRANSPORTION CLOSED HIGHWAY 121 SOUTH OF BLACKSHEAR DUE TO FLOOD WATER FLOWING OVER BRIDGE JUST SOUTH OF AZALEA STREET OVER BAXTER/BERNIE BRANCH THAT DRAINS FROM LAKEVIEW LAKE.

UPDATE FROM PIERCE COUNTY LAW ENFORCEMENT REGARDING LAKEVIEW COUNTRY CLUB LAKE DAM FAILURE...WATER HAS FALLEN ABOUT 5 FT ACROSS 40 ACRE LAKE SINCE DAM FAILURE YESTERDAY. BAXTER/BERNIE BRANCH DRAINAGE RISEN 8-12 INCHES IN PAST 5 HRS. VOIGT BRIDGE CLOSE TO BEING UNDER WATER. NO REPORTS OF FLOOD WATER IN STRUCTURES AT THIS TIME. DAM EROSION STILL ONGOING AT TIME OF UPDATE.
